Commission Calculation Architecture

1
Data Gathering
Calculate intermediate values
6 Rule Types
  • Quota Attainment
  • Rate Lookups
  • Variable Pay Lookups
  • Bonus Lookups
  • Range Lookups
2
Payout Calculation
Combine data into payouts
Flexible Formulas
  • Input 1 (Earning/Data)
  • Operator (×, +, −, ÷)
  • Input 2 (Earning/Data)
  • = Payout Amount
Grand Payout Summary
Combine all payout rules with operators (+, −, ×, ÷)
Example Total
$14,500
  • Data Gathering
  • Payout Rules
  • Examples

Data Gathering Rule Types

Phase 1: Calculate intermediate values like rates, percentages, and amounts

6 Rule Types

{{ruleType.title}}

{{ruleType.description}}

Input:
{{ruleType.input}}
Formula:
{{ruleType.formula}}
{{ruleType.output || 'Output'}} {{ruleType.example}}

Rule Chaining

Data gathering steps can chain together - the output of one step can become the input of another step.

Example Chain:
Step 1 Calculate Quota Attainment → Output: 105%
Step 2 Range Lookup using Step 1 (105%) → Output: 7% rate

Payout Summary Rules

Phase 2: Combine inputs with operators to calculate commission payouts

Payout Rule Formula Structure

Input 1
Earning Rule
OR
Data Step
×
Operator
× + − ÷
×
Input 2
Earning Rule
OR
Data Step
=
Result
Payout $
{{example.label}} {{example.title}}
{{example.input1}} × {{example.input2}}
Calculation:

{{example.calculation}}

Payout

{{example.result}}

Complete Commission Plan Examples

End-to-end examples showing data gathering steps and payout calculations

Example 1: Basic Commission Plan

Simple percentage-based commission with quota bonus

Phase 1: Data Gathering Steps
Step 1
Quota Attainment
Input: Total ARR
105%
Step 2
Base Rate Lookup
Input: User Info
5%
Step 3
Bonus Lookup
Input: Product
$2,000
Phase 2: Payout Summary Rules
Payout 1 Base Commission
ARR ($100K) × Rate (5%)
$5,000
Payout 2 Product Bonus
Deals (3) × Bonus ($2K)
$6,000
Grand Total Formula
$5,000 + $6,000
Total Commission
$11,000
